info.name: Eway Bill OCR API
info.description: API collection for Eway Bill OCR tool hosted on Render

formdata.description: Upload any Eway Bill PDF or image (JPG, PNG, TIFF, BMP)

request.description: Upload an Eway Bill PDF or scanned image. Returns structured JSON with all extracted fields.

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Download the extracted JSON file. Copy the json_file value from the upload response and set it as the {{json_file}} environment variable. Must be downloaded immediately after upload as Render clears files on restart.
Check if the server is running. Returns the web UI.
